description_long: This compact keyboard features a rectangular wooden or wood-textured base with a dark lower edge and six large, gray keycaps arranged in two rows of three. The keycaps are slightly raised and have a matte finish, providing a tactile surface for pressing. A single black cable is attached to the rear center of the keyboard, indicating a wired connection, and the cable appears to be detachable. The top surface of the base has a visible wood grain pattern, adding a touch of visual warmth and texture. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or extra function keys. The keyboard is small and portable, likely intended for specialized or macro input rather than full typing.
description: A small, wood-textured keyboard with six large gray keys and a single attached cable, featuring a minimalist and compact design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the six gray keycaps in two rows and the cable extending from the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the cable connection at the center and the wood grain pattern on the top surface.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the raised keycaps and the cable extending from the right.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view focusing on the cable attachment and the arrangement of the keycaps.
